title: Phase 10A: Pricing module - service, API, import workflow, cost change center
description: Build pricing module backend and primary UI: pricing service with import, cost change detection, margin calculation, and quote exposure analysis; API routes; vendor price import workflow page; and cost change center page.
steps: Create src/lib/services/pricing.service.ts with vendor price import processing
Implement cost change detection (compare new vs current prices)
Implement margin calculation and impact analysis across open quotes
Create src/app/api/pricing/imports/route.ts with price import management
Create src/app/api/pricing/cost-changes/route.ts with cost change queries
Create src/app/(dashboard)/pricing/import/page.tsx with vendor price import workflow
Include CSV/XLSX upload, field mapping, preview diff, approve/reject
Create src/app/(dashboard)/pricing/cost-changes/page.tsx with cost change center DataTable
Display severity levels: LOSS, CRITICAL, WARNING, OK with color coding
